title: Skibidi Faister Totem
description: Change your totem to Skibidi Faister!
body:
This resourcepack is a fan project for the german streamer [Faister](https://www.twitch.tv/faister). 
The only feature it has is that it replaces the Totem of Undying with a Skibidi Toilet with faisters.

Does not require Optifine or other mods.
